entries.source: What achievement system should we design?
entries.value: Nidaamkee guulaha ah ee ay tahay inaan naqshadeynaa?
Ciyaareynta (Gamification)

entries.source: Create badges for consistency, mastery, courage, revision, collaboration, and finished artifacts.
entries.value: Abuur calaamado loogu talagalay joogtaynta, xirfad-sarraynta, geesinimada, dib-u-eegista, wada-shaqeynta, iyo waxyaabaha la dhammaystiray.

entries.source: Learners exploring gamification topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: Ardayda sahaminaya mowduucyada ciyaareynta ee raba hage wax ku ool ah halkii ay ka heli lahaayeen sanduuq jawaab guud.

entries.source: This mode is tuned for badges & achievements with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: Habkan waxaa loo habeeyay calaamadaha iyo guulaha iyadoo leh dhiirigelin, tusaalooyin, iyo habsocod waxbarasho oo u gaar ah.
Abaalmari marxaladaha muhiimka ah ee qiimaha leh
Ku bilow tusaalooyin dhiirigelin ah

entries.source: Adapt the session to your goal
entries.value: La qabso kalfadhiga yoolkaaga
U samee calaamado fasalkayga
Abaalmarinta marxaladaha dib-u-eegista
Samee xeerarka guusha
Looxada Hoggaaminta
Ka dhig tartanka mid caafimaad qaba

entries.source: Create fair leaderboards that reward effort, improvement, teamwork, or consistency without discouraging slower learners.
entries.value: Samee looxad hoggaamineed oo caddaalad ah oo abaalmarisa dadaalka, horumarka, wada-shaqeynta, ama joogteynta iyada oo aan niyad-jabin kuwa si tartiib ah wax u barta.
Maxay tahay in looxada hoggaamintu cabbirto?

entries.source: Build check-ins that keep you moving
entries.value: Dhis hubin kaa caawinaysa inaad horay u socoto

entries.source: Create accountability check-ins with clear commitments, proof, recovery rules, and supportive follow-up.
entries.value: Samee hubin isla-xisaabtan oo leh ballanqaadyo cad, caddayn, xeerarka soo kabashada, iyo daba-gal taageero leh.
